raw: With this pass, one adult 50% discounted admission With this pass, children (ages 5-17) $1.00 admission No discounts on classes, tours, or retail items The Garden is open mid-April to October 15 Check website (http://www.nativeplanttrust.org/visit/garden-woods/) for exact dates & hours before visiting *This pass needs to be picked up at and returned to Reading Public Library
